steps.did: Navigate to the shared chest at (-117, 68, -91) to ensure I have cobblestone walls and torches, then move to position (-153, 70, -127) to place a cobblestone_wall block extending the perimeter wall westward from (-152, 70, -127), and place a torch at (-153, 70, -127) to light the new section.

Check the block at (-164, 70, -127) to see if it exists; if it does, move to (-165, 70, -127) and place a wall and torch there to continue the perimeter westward.
Navigate to the shared chest at (-117, 68, -91), retrieve 20 torches, then return to position (-165, 70, -127) to place a cobblestone_wall block and a torch, extending the perimeter westward.
continue building workshop perimeter
Navigate to the shared chest at (-117, 68, -91), retrieve 20 torches, then navigate to position (-166, 70, -127) to place a cobblestone_wall block and a torch, extending the perimeter westward.
Navigate to position (-167, 70, -127) to place a cobblestone_wall block and a torch, extending the perimeter wall westward from (-166, 70, -127).
Navigate to the shared chest at (-117, 68, -91), open it, and check for torches. If none are found, craft torches from inventory (charcoal/sticks) and place them in the chest or use them immediately.
Craft torches from charcoal and sticks, then navigate to position (-168, 70, -127) to place a cobblestone_wall block and a torch, extending the perimeter wall westward from (-167, 70, -127).
Navigate to position (-169, 70, -127) to place a cobblestone_wall block and a torch, extending the perimeter wall westward from (-168, 70, -127).
Navigate to position (-169, 70, -127) to check if a cobblestone_wall block exists; if not, place one and a torch to secure this segment of the perimeter.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80), hunt for any nearby passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs, salmon) for raw food, and deposit the food into the shared chest at (-117, 66, -91).
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80) and use the wooden hoe to till the dirt blocks adjacent to the water to prepare farmland.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80), equip the wheat seeds, and plant them on the tilled farmland blocks adjacent to the water.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80) and use the wooden hoe to place the wheat seeds on the tilled farmland blocks adjacent to the water.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80) and plant the wheat seeds on the tilled farmland blocks to establish the farm.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80) and check the status of the tilled farmland; if wheat has grown, harvest it, otherwise till more adjacent dirt blocks to expand the farm.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80).
Gather wood logs to craft a wooden pickaxe and basic tools, enabling me to mine stone and eventually resume farming or hunting effectively.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80), hunt for any nearby passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs, salmon) for raw food, and deposit the food into the shared chest at (-117, 66, -91).
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80), hunt for any nearby passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs, salmon) for raw food, and deposit the food into the shared chest at (-117, 66, -91).

Check for nearby passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs) around the workshop (-117, 64, -91). If found, kill one and deposit the raw meat into the shared chest at (-117, 66, -91). If no mobs are found, wait 10 seconds and check again.

Use the gather_meat skill to check for nearby passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs) around the workshop (-117, 64, -91). If found, kill one and deposit the raw meat into the shared chest at (-117, 66, -91). If no mobs are found, wait 10 seconds and check again.
Navigate to the nearest oak tree and collect 5 wood logs using the collect_wood skill.
Use the equip_wooden_tools skill to craft a wooden pickaxe and sword from the oak logs and planks in inventory, enabling hunting or mining.

Navigate to the crafting table at (-118, 65, -85), craft a chest from oak planks, and then use the wooden sword to hunt for nearby passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs) to gather raw food for the community.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80), hunt for any nearby passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs, salmon) for raw food, and deposit the food into the shared chest at (-117, 66, -91).
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80) to check the farm status and look for passive mobs.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80) to search for passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs, salmon) to gather raw food for the community.
Navigate to a stone source, mine cobblestone using the wooden pickaxe, and craft a stone hoe to enable sustainable farming.
Gather wood logs, craft a wooden pickaxe and sword, and equip them to enable mining and hunting.
Navigate away from the water source to the grassy plains near the workshop (-117, 64, -91) to search for passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs) that are more likely to be found on land.
Navigate to the water source at (-84, 64, -80) to search for salmon or other aquatic/passive mobs that may have spawned there, and if found, hunt them for food.

Navigate to a new location approximately 50 blocks east of the workshop (around -67, 64, -91) to search for passive mobs (chickens, cows, pigs) in a fresh area, and if found, kill one to gather raw food for the community.
Navigate to the nearest stone source and mine cobblestone using the wooden pickaxe to acquire materials for crafting a stone hoe and eventually a fishing rod.
Craft a stone pickaxe from the 20 cobblestone in inventory, then use it to mine more cobblestone if needed to craft a stone sword, and hunt the nearby sheep for mutton.
Find and punch a nearby tree to collect 5 wood logs.
Craft a crafting table using the oak logs I have collected.
Craft a wooden pickaxe using oak planks and sticks.
Locate a nearby tree, mine 5 oak logs, and craft them into planks to have enough wood for shelter walls.
Navigate to the shelter foundation site at (-116, 69, -90) and place oak_planks to complete the foundation expansion.
Navigate to the shelter foundation site at (-116, 69, -90) and place oak_planks to complete the foundation expansion.
continue building shelter foundation expansion
Navigate to the shelter foundation site at (-116, 69, -90) and place the remaining oak_plank block to complete the foundation expansion.
Navigate to (-116, 69, -90) and place 1 oak_plank to complete the shelter foundation expansion.
Navigate to a nearby tree and mine oak logs to replenish oak_planks for the shelter construction.
Navigate to (-116, 69, -90) and place 1 oak_plank to complete the shelter foundation expansion.
Navigate to a nearby tree and mine 5 oak logs to craft oak_planks for the shelter foundation expansion.
Navigate to (-116, 69, -90) and place the final oak_plank to complete the shelter foundation expansion.
continue building shelter foundation expansion
Navigate to (-116, 69, -90), check if an oak_plank is already there, and if not, place one to finalize the foundation expansion.
Navigate to (-116, 69, -90) and place 1 oak_plank to finalize the shelter foundation expansion, then verify the foundation is complete.
Navigate to (-116, 69, -90) and place 1 oak_plank to finalize the shelter foundation expansion, then verify the foundation is complete.
Navigate to the north wall position of the shelter foundation at (-116, 69, -89) and place an oak_plank to begin the first course of the north wall.
Navigate to (-116, 70, -90) and place an oak_plank to build the second block of the north wall (Y=70), ensuring it stacks on the block placed at (-116, 69, -89).
Navigate to (-116, 70, -89) and place an oak_plank to extend the north wall eastward from the current corner block at (-116, 70, -90).
continue building shelter foundation expansion
Navigate to (-116, 71, -90) and place an oak_plank to build the third block of the north wall (Y=71), stacking directly on the block at (-116, 70, -90).
Navigate to (-116, 72, -90) and place an oak_plank to build the fourth block of the north wall (Y=72), stacking directly on the block at (-116, 71, -90).
Navigate to (-116, 70, -90) to stand on the second course of the north wall, verify the structure's current state, and then place an oak_plank at (-116, 71, -90) to continue the wall upwards.
Navigate to (-116, 70, -90) to stand on the second course of the north wall, verify the structure's current state, and then place an oak_plank at (-116, 71, -90) to continue the wall upwards.
Navigate to the corner block at (-116, 72, -90) and place an oak_plank at (-116, 72, -89) to extend the north wall eastward, continuing the first floor's perimeter.
Navigate to (-116, 70, -89) and place an oak_plank at (-116, 70, -90) to complete the north wall's first floor corner, then place an oak_plank at (-116, 69, -89) to start the south wall.
Navigate to (-116, 70, -90) and place an oak_plank at (-116, 70, -91) to extend the north wall eastward, continuing the first floor's perimeter.

Mine cobblestone from nearby stone blocks and deposit surplus into the shared workshop chests.
Mine more cobblestone from the nearby stone blocks to build a surplus for the workshop.
Mine additional cobblestone from the nearby stone blocks to build a surplus for the workshop.
Mine cobblestone from the nearby stone blocks to replenish and build a surplus for the workshop.
Dig out of the hole to reach the surface at Y=67 or higher.
Find and mine a nearby oak log, craft it into planks, then craft sticks and a wooden pickaxe.
Locate and mine 5 oak logs to replenish wood supply for the community.
Craft a wooden pickaxe and then use it to mine 10 cobblestone to enable stone tool crafting.
Move to the nearby crafting table at (-78, 63, -87), craft a stone pickaxe using the 10 cobblestone, and equip it.
Move to the crafting table at (-78, 63, -87), craft a stone axe using the existing cobblestone and sticks, and equip it to begin efficiently gathering wood for the community.
Move to the nearest oak tree and mine 5 oak logs to replenish the community's wood supply.
Craft and equip a stone axe to efficiently gather wood for the community.
Dig down to Y=63 to create a 2-block high shaft, then jump up to escape the hole and reach the surface.
Locate and mine a nearby oak log to begin gathering wood for crafting tools and shelter materials.
Craft a wooden pickaxe using oak planks and sticks.
Mine cobblestone using the wooden pickaxe, then craft a stone pickaxe.
Claim the Community Workshop slot in the village plan and craft a crafting table to enable advanced construction.
Mine cobblestone from the nearby surface to gather building materials for the workshop walls.
Dig out of the hole: Move to an adjacent air block and dig upwards to reach the surface.
Find the nearest oak tree, mine 5 oak logs, craft them into planks, craft sticks, and craft a wooden pickaxe.
Mine cobblestone using the wooden pickaxe, then craft a stone pickaxe.
Craft a crafting table from oak logs, then craft sticks from planks, then craft a wooden pickaxe.
Mine cobblestone using the wooden pickaxe, then craft a stone pickaxe.
Claim the 'Stone Storage' slot at (-117, 68, -91) in the village plan, then move to that location.
Mine cobblestone using the stone pickaxe to gather building materials for the Stone Storage.
Craft a wooden pickaxe from the nearby oak logs and planks to enable stone mining.
Move to the Stone Storage location at (-117, 68, -91), equip the stone pickaxe, and mine cobblestone from the nearby stone blocks until I have at least 20 cobblestone for wall construction.
Equip the stone pickaxe and mine nearby stone/cobblestone blocks until I have at least 20 cobblestone in my inventory.
Swim out of the water to the nearest land block, then navigate to the Stone Storage location at (-117, 68, -91).
Craft planks from oak logs, then craft a chest using the planks and sticks.
Mine cobblestone using the stone pickaxe and craft a chest if not already crafted, then place the chest at the Stone Storage location.
Navigate to the Stone Storage location at (-117, 68, -91) to begin construction.
Dig out of the hole I am currently stuck in.

Use the craft_crafting_table skill to ensure a crafting table is available and functional, then use the mine_cobblestone skill to verify I can interact with the environment, before attempting to place the chest again.
Gather wood logs and craft a wooden pickaxe
Mine cobblestone and craft a stone pickaxe
Mine cobblestone and search for coal ore to stock up supplies.
Dig out to the surface and move towards the community workshop area to deposit coal and cobblestone.
Craft planks from oak logs and craft a stone pickaxe if needed, then mine more cobblestone and coal to build a larger surplus for delivery.

Navigate to the Community Workshop at (-115, 68, -89) and attempt to deposit 5 cobblestone and 2 coal into the shared storage chest at (-117, 68, -91). If the chest is not found or accessible, switch to gathering 5 oak logs from the nearest tree.
Locate and mine 5 oak logs to gather wood resources.
Craft a wooden pickaxe using the oak planks derived from the oak logs in my inventory.
Mine cobblestone using the wooden pickaxe to enable stone tool crafting and community storage construction.
Move to the Stone Storage site at (-117, 68, -91) and claim the slot to begin construction.
Craft a wooden pickaxe and a wooden sword to enable mining and self-defense for food gathering.
Mine nearby stone blocks to acquire cobblestone, then craft a stone pickaxe.
Go to the nearby crafting table at (-87, 65, -81), craft a wooden hoe, and then till the dirt blocks near the water source (2 blocks away) to prepare farmland for planting.

Go to the nearby crafting table at (-87, 65, -81), craft a stone axe using the cobblestone and sticks in inventory, and then use it to chop down the nearest oak tree to gather more wood logs. While chopping, check for and collect any dropped apples or seeds from the leaves.

Equip the wooden sword and search for nearby passive mobs (chickens, pigs, or cows) to hunt for raw food. If no mobs are found, break tall grass in a wider radius to search for seeds again as a secondary option.

Go to the nearby crafting table at (-87, 65, -81) to ensure I have a good view and mobility, then actively hunt for any nearby passive mobs (chickens, pigs, cows) using the wooden sword. If a mob is found, kill it and collect the raw meat. If no mobs are found, break tall grass in a wide radius to search for seeds.

Go to the nearby crafting table at (-87, 65, -81), craft a stone hoe using the cobblestone and sticks, then till the dirt blocks near the water source (2 blocks away) to prepare more farmland. If I have seeds (I have 1), plant them. If no seeds are available, use the stone axe to chop down a tree to collect more apples from leaves, or hunt nearby passive mobs for food.
Go to the crafting table at (-87, 65, -81), then hunt for passive mobs or break tall grass to collect seeds and apples.
Go to the crafting table at (-87, 65, -81), then hunt for passive mobs or break tall grass to collect seeds and apples.
Dig out of the hole to reach the surface and locate nearby passive mobs for food.
Go to the tilled farmland near the water source, plant the wheat seeds, and break tall grass to collect more seeds for future planting.
Hunt nearby passive mobs (salmon in water, or chickens/pigs on land) for raw food, and break tall grass to collect additional seeds.
Go to the tilled farmland near the water source, plant the wheat seeds, and break tall grass to collect more seeds for future planting.
Hunt nearby passive mobs (salmon in water, or chickens/pigs on land) for raw food, and break tall grass to collect additional seeds.

Go to the crafting table at (-80, 63, -83), craft a stone hoe, then till the dirt blocks near the water source (2 blocks away) and plant the 1 wheat seed I have. After planting, break nearby tall grass to collect more seeds for future planting.
